title: Sattunnu Enna Lyrics Thamizhukku En Ondrai Azhuthavum Song Lyrics
stanzas:
Sattunnu Enna Lyrics from
Thamizhukku En Ondrai Azhuthavum Movie
Singer(s): Hariharasudhan
Music: Thaman S

Sattunu enna saachiputta
yaaru andha pulla.
Sakkaram pola naanum suththa
yedho aachu ulla. (2)

Ava enna pakkayila
kavundheney boomiyila
ava solla ketkayila
marandhaen velaigala.

Ava ora kannaala
katti veesi puttaale.
oru kaayam illaama
enna gaali senjaale.

Ava rosa kaiyyaala
romba lesa thottaalae.
Ava nenju kullara
velakkeththi vechchaale.

enakkellaam thandhidave
ava vandha vakkanayaa.
oru thaayaa ennayumthaan
kaaththa akkarayaa.

ava munna ninnaale
puli kooda pumbidumey.
Ava jaada senjaale
ada yaana kumbidumey.

Ila nenja salladayaa
salichchaale sillarayaa.
ava manna thottaalum
adhu aagum sakkarayaa.

Sattunu enna saachiputta
yaaru andha pulla.
Sakkaram pola naanum suththa
yedho aachu ulla.

enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

What is the meaning of the song Sattunnu Enna?

The song conveys feelings of heartbreak and longing, expressing the pain of separation and memories of love.

What is the context of this song in the movie Thamizhukku En Ondrai Azhuthavum?

This song reflects a pivotal emotional moment in the film, highlighting the protagonist's struggles with love and loss.

Who is the singer of the song?

The song is sung by Hariharasudhan, known for his emotive singing style.

Who composed the music for this song?

The music for Sattunnu Enna is composed by Thaman S, who is recognized for his impactful melodies.

When was the song released?

The song was released on November 23, 2014.
enrichedMetadata.summary: In Sattunnu Enna, the protagonist expresses deep sorrow and nostalgia over a lost love, encapsulating the essence of heartbreak. The song's melancholic tone and heartfelt lyrics evoke a sense of longing that resonates with anyone who has experienced similar emotions. Set against the backdrop of Thamizhukku En Ondrai Azhuthavum, it serves as a poignant reminder of the complexities of love. Through Hariharasudhan's soulful voice, the song beautifully conveys the pain of memories that linger long after a relationship has ended.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Sattunnu Enna from Thamizhukku En Ondrai Azhuthavum captures the essence of longing and heartbreak with its poignant lyrics and soulful rendition by Hariharasudhan. The collaboration with music director Thaman S adds a unique flavor that resonates deeply with listeners. Experience the emotional depth of this melody that beautifully narrates the pain of lost love.
stanzaMeanings: Who is that person who has made me suffer? Like sugar, I have also become something pure inside.
I forgot my work while thinking about her, as I was lost in her presence on this earth.
She has tied me with her eyes. Without any reason, she has made me feel like a fool.
With her soft hands, she has touched me lightly. She has lit a fire in my heart.
She has made me feel like a train running in my mind. She has made me dance in the crowd.
She has made me sing like a cuckoo.
She has given me everything, and now she has come to me. A mother has also taken care of me.
In front of her, even a tiger would be scared. She has made me feel like a lion.
If my heart is not at peace, it will become a problem. Even if she touches the ground, it will turn sweet.
Who is that person who has made me suffer? Like sugar, I have also become something pure inside.
